# UICornerCurve.continuous

**Case**

Always uses a continuous corner style.

## Declaration

```swift
case continuous
```

## Choosing a corner style

- **UICornerCurve.automatic**: Selects the corner style automatically.
- **UICornerCurve.circular**: Always uses a circular corner style.

items.description: Always uses a circular corner style.
items.name: UICornerCurve.circular
